name: garcon
description: A cross-platform agentic coding UI for Claude Code, Codex, and Opencode

scripts.install: bun install --cwd server && bun install --cwd web && bun install --cwd integration-tests
scripts.build-exe: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build && bun run build-exe:compile && bun run build-exe:smoke
scripts.test: bun run test:server && bun run --cwd web test
scripts.test:server: bun test scripts/__tests__/*.test.js && bun test server-agents/interface/src/testing/__tests__/*.test.ts && bun test server/__tests__/*.test.js && bun test server/chats/search/__tests__/*.test.js && for f in server/**/__tests__/*.test.js; do bun test "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run --cwd web check
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd server-agents/interface typecheck && bun run --cwd server typecheck && bun run --cwd web check && bun run --cwd integration-tests typecheck

author: Alex Lau <github@alau.ca>
